name: Snowy Owl Gold Corp.
summary: Snowy Owl Gold Corp. a mineral exploration company, focuses on acquiring, exploring, and developing gold projects in Canada. It has a 100% interest in the Golden Eagle property, which consists of 161 map designated claims covering a total of 8,887.65 hectares within the Abitibi region located in Quebec, Canada. The company was formerly known as 56 Acquisitions Inc. and changed its name to Snowy Owl Gold Corp. in May 2020. Snowy Owl Gold Corp. was incorporated in 2018 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
